title: erodium littoreum var. murcicum
intro: Erodium littoreum var. murcicum, also known as a variant of the herbaceous perennial plant Erodium littoreum, is a species of plant in the geranium family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Erodium littoreum var. murcicum are said to include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
